features.name: $bits() with hierarchical interface signal reference
features.description: Code should include a $bits() function call with a hierarchical dotted reference to an interface signal member used in a constant expression

features.name: $bits() with concatenated interface signals
features.description: Code should include a $bits() function call with concatenation of multiple hierarchical interface signal references used in a constant expression

features.name: $bits() on interface typedef member
features.description: Code should include a $bits() function call with a hierarchical reference to a typedef defined within an interface, used as a constant expression array size
